infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Tailo scans your recent photos to find pet moments for your timeline.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Tailo can save photos you capture in the app to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Tailo uses the camera so you can capture new pet moments.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Tailo may use the microphone when recording video moments.
